recommendations.title: The Mosquito Coast
recommendations.overview: An inventor spurns his city life and moves his family into the jungles of Central America to make a utopia.

recommendations.title: The Truman Show
recommendations.overview: In a picture-perfect seaside town, an insurance salesman begins to realize that his entire existence may be staged and observed by a vast unseen audience as part of a reality TV show.

recommendations.title: Gallipoli
recommendations.overview: Two Australian sprinters face the brutal realities of war when they are sent to fight in the Gallipoli campaign in the Ottoman Empire during World War I.

recommendations.title: Dead Poets Society
recommendations.overview: At an elite, old-fashioned boarding school in New England, a passionate English teacher inspires his students to rebel against convention and seize the potential of every day, courting the disdain of the stern headmaster.

recommendations.title: The Last Wave
recommendations.overview: A Sydney lawyer defends five Aboriginal people in a ritualised taboo murder and in the process learns disturbing truths about himself and premonitions.

recommendations.title: Witness
recommendations.overview: While protecting an Amish boy—the sole witness to a brutal murder—and his mother, a detective is forced to seek refuge within their community when his own life comes under threat.

recommendations.title: The Year of Living Dangerously
recommendations.overview: A young Australian reporter tries to navigate the political turmoil of Indonesia during the rule of President Sukarno with the help of a diminutive photographer.

recommendations.title: Master and Commander: The Far Side of the World
recommendations.overview: After an abrupt and violent encounter with a French warship inflicts severe damage upon his ship, a captain of the British Royal Navy begins a chase over two oceans to capture or destroy the enemy, though he must weigh his commitment to duty and fero

recommendations.title: Fearless
recommendations.overview: After surviving a plane crash that kills many others, Max Klein develops a sense of invulnerability, leading to radical, compulsive actions. Can a psychologist and a fellow guilt-ridden survivor bring him down to earth?

recommendations.title: The Cars That Ate Paris
